candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is explicitly tied to Research & Development Expenses, not to Cost of goods and services sold / COGS. It therefore does not belong in the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: No separate operating D&A row related to COGS / cost of revenues is visible above the financial section. Do not add any COGS D&A separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit R&D-related amortization row above EBIT and could conceptually relate to the broader XSGA bucket. However, the selected reference buckets already include 'Research- and development expenses' in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Per the R&D interaction rule, when the same above-EBIT R&D expense row is already included in both buckets, do not add the R&D amortization row separately to avoid distortion or double counting.

variables.notes: The only visible operating D&A row is tied to R&D. Because 'Research- and development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, no separate XSGA_DA row should be added.
